Ulcers- Stage IV At SOC ROC This field indicates the current number of unhealed pressure ulcers at stage IV that were present on admission

M1308_NSTG_DRSG M1308 Number of Unstageable Pressure Ulcers Due To Non-Rmvble Dsg This field indicates the current number of unstageable unhealed pressure ulcers due to non-removable dressing or
device (enter 0 if none). CHAR 2 x x x
